resources.string: Each person joins the same room, captures one camera frame every second, and sees the other person\'s latest picture as the main view.
Permissions granted. Ready to join a shared room.
Add your name and room code first.
Camera and microphone permission are still required.
Camera is starting. You can join once the preview appears.
Sending one frame each second to room %1$s
Could not reach the frame relay server.
The camera preview could not start.

Client contract: POST /rooms/{room}/frame with JPEG body and headers X-Participant-Id, X-Participant-Name. GET /rooms/{room}/frame?excludeParticipant={id} should return 200 with image/jpeg and header X-Participant-Name, or 204 when no remote frame is available.
Your friend\'s camera will appear here
This panel refreshes with the newest JPEG downloaded from the shared room.
The image updates roughly once per second whenever your friend sends a new frame.
Your camera frames will be captured from the preview and sent after you start sharing.
Preview is ready. The app can now capture and send one frame each second.
Last frame sent from your camera preview.
